betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§7§oThe roost is a midgame alternative to the Nesting Pen that becomes available in chapter 4.

The Catcher is use to collect chickens as in-world entities, and it turn them into items that are used in the Roost.

Chickens in this form have stats: Gain, Strength, Growth that determine how fast they lay eggs. These stas can be increased using the Breeder, or with the Lovely Chicken.

It is not as scalable and as a Mechanized Coop for the endgame and postgame, but it is a single block so it may be more versatile in many cases, especially with all the chichens you will be farming through the mythic shells.
